untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'policy intervention announcement' which is an external event/news trigger not representable via price/technical indicators. Also requires tracking of 'position already exists' which requires portfolio state management beyond indicator-based rules. The 'no immediate reversal in first 5 bars' condition requires forward-looking bar-by-bar pattern matching not supported by standard operators.
translation_notes: Translated the core tradeable components: maintaining positions when price stays above 20-period MA (sma_20) post-announcement. Used price_pos_20 as proxy for trend alignment. Unable to encode the announcement detection, existing position check, or 5-bar reversal pattern without external event data and portfolio state variables. This rule requires hybrid logic combining news/event triggers with technical conditions.
